gist.headline: Pruning the garden
gist.blurb: Just doing some routine maintenance to keep our community app showcase fresh and working perfectly.
gist.summary: Automated cleanup removing an inactive community app link from the showcase.
gist.impact: Ensures the community showcase only features active, working applications for users to explore.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee doing some light gardening or sweeping up dead leaves around the community garden, representing routine maintenance.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's apron, gently sweeping up a few brown pixelated leaves from a vibrant digital garden. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
